explicit_text: We had some trouble getting permission to copyright the name Coney Island, but eventually we were able to copyright the word 'coney islander' after paying some people. We always kept the word Coney Island for the downtown store. Changing the recipe for the Coney Island Hot Weiners was a big mistake because customers were used to the original saltiness and hollered when I tried the original recipe again.
